creator: alex@kuznetcoff.ru
text:
I have the same problem too. sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.15.2_7 works fine, but sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.15.2_8 crashes when remote server use SSL to relay mail. Sending mail without SSL still works fine.

The difference between packages is:

r463590 | dinoex | 2018-03-04 17:45:26 +0000 (Sun, 04 Mar 2018) | 2 lines
- fix build with openssl 1.1 and libressl
